Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Task Create two POWL models based on provided text description of hiring process Context hiring process involves screening assessments cultural fit final decisions bias risk in Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check Model 1 Unfair include XOR branch Model 2 Fair remove bias source Format use pm4py library constructs Specific Operators XOR LOOP PO Activity Labels use specific labels from text

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process for Model 1 Start ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo POWL Loop structure LOOP DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Sequence SkillAssessment XOR Branch CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Sequence ManagerialReview FinalDecision PO Structure connect sequentially Refining the Loop text says missing information triggers loop POWL LOOP fits Refining the XOR text says XOR choice maps to XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Refining the PO Nodes LoopNode SkillAssessment XORNode ManagerialReview FinalDecision Edges Loop SkillAssessment SkillAssessment XORNode etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process for Model 2 Start ReceiveApplication Loop same as Model 1 Sequence SkillAssessment No XOR Bias CulturalFitCheck Sequence ManagerialReview FinalDecision PO Structure connect sequentially

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the Code Import statements Define Transitions for both models Define Operators Loop XOR Define StrictPartialOrder for each Ensure logic matches POWL definition Correction on Loop Syntax follow prompt definition children A B Correction on XOR Syntax X A B Model 1 Unfair Nodes ReceiveApplication LoopNode SkillAssessment XORNode ManagerialReview FinalDecision Order ReceiveApplication LoopNode etc Model 2 Fair Nodes ReceiveApplication LoopNode SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Order ReceiveApplication LoopNode etc

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrection on Loop Logic prompt says execute A then either exit or execute B then A again fits DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SelfCorrection on XOR Logic XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Refining Model 1 XOR node source of bias Refining Model 2 fair cultural Transition no XOR Loop OperatorPOWL LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo PO Construction nodes include operators edges create flow Final check on Loop definition matches description Final check on Model 2 remove XOR direct transition Final check on Model 1 XOR branch unfairness

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Reviewing Constraints Use pm4py classes specific labels Model 1 show unfairness via XOR Model 2 remove branch include loop both One detail prompt asks produce two POWL models write Python code Checking imports follow example StrictPartialOrder constructor nodes order add edge One nuance Model 1 XOR bias Model 2 no XOR rest same Labels match prompt ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck etc Structure Model 1 ReceiveApplication Loop SkillAssessment XOR ManagerialReview FinalDecision Model 2 ReceiveApplication Loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Include ReceiveApplication in PO POWL definition operators as nodes good One final check Loop children A B correct
